sourcesContent:
const projects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Recipe Explorer',
    description: 'A recipe discovery app with ingredient search, categories, and live API data.',
    tech: ['React', 'REST API', 'Tailwind CSS'],
    category: 'API',
    status: 'Live',
    liveLink: '#',
    githubLink: '#'
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Portfolio Studio',
    description: 'A polished portfolio hero and project showcase for designers and developers.',
    tech: ['React', 'Animations', 'Responsive UI'],
    category: 'UI',
    status: 'New',
    liveLink: '#',
    githubLink: '#'
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Task Tracker',
    description: 'A task management dashboard with filtering, categories, and drag interactions.',
    tech: ['React', 'Local Storage', 'UX Design'],
    category: 'Full Stack',
    status: 'Stable',
    liveLink: '#',
    githubLink: '#'
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Weather Sentinel',
    description: 'Real-time weather lookup with geolocation and forecast cards.',
    tech: ['React', 'OpenWeather API', 'Responsive Layout'],
    category: 'API',
    status: 'Live',
    liveLink: '#',
    githubLink: '#'
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: 'Dashboard Builder',
    description: 'An admin-style analytics panel featuring charts and data summaries.',
    tech: ['React', 'UI Components', 'Dark Mode'],
    category: 'UI',
    status: 'Build',
    liveLink: '#',
    githubLink: '#'
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: 'Book Review Hub',
    description: 'A full stack review platform with book search and ratings.',
    tech: ['React', 'Node.js', 'MongoDB'],
    category: 'Full Stack',
    status: 'Preview',
    liveLink: '#',
    githubLink: '#'
  }
];

export default projects;
